sentence_reviews.text: Stochastic gradient descent estimates gradients from minibatches; momentum and related variants accumulate update direction to reduce noise and accelerate consistent descent.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8.1-8.3 on stochastic gradient descent, minibatches, and momentum.
sentence_reviews.notes: Minibatch gradient estimates and momentum accumulation are directly covered. The noise-reduction/consistent-descent wording is an explanatory synthesis.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Chapter 8 'Optimization for Training Deep Models'.
sentence_reviews.notes: SGD and momentum are presented as optimization algorithms; the wording is atlas synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Optimization theory, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, SGD, momentum & stochastic optimization is modeled as depending on Optimization theory, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Adam, Adafactor & adaptive optimizers.
